name: Invicta Holdings Limited
summary: Invicta Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, distributes engineering components and consumables, and provides technical services and solutions in South Africa, Singapore, and rest of Africa. It operates through three segments: Engineering Solutions Group, Capital Equipment Group, and Kian Ann Engineering. The company distributes engineering consumables, including bearings, seals and gaskets, power transmissions, material handling solutions, fasteners, geared and electric drives, and motor and tools; fluid technology products and solutions, such as hydraulic, pneumatic, filtration, and lubrication; and technical design, on-site installation, maintenance, breakdown, condition monitoring, as well as design engineering and failure analysis services, and belting products. It also distributes vibrating equipment; industrial gearbox units; tools and equipment, including personal protective equipment, lifting, and welding products; vibrator motors, and tensioning and suspension systems; and automotive components and solutions. In addition, the company imports, supplies, and distributes agricultural machinery, implements, and related spare parts; construction and mining equipment, such as crawler excavators, wheel loaders, wheel excavators, wheel excavators, mini-excavators, backhoe loaders, skid-steer loaders, crushing and screening equipment, ground-engaging tools, articulated dump trucks, hydraulic hammers, and turf related machinery; after-market replacement spare parts for agricultural machinery; heavy machinery parts and diesel engine components; and forklift trucks and equipment. Further, it holds properties; and involved in the financial and treasury activities. The company is headquartered in Johannesburg, South Africa.
